info.title: Find And Merge
info.description: API endpoints for finding and merging duplicate records in Zoho CRM modules. Supports querying merge job status and performing record merge operations with field mapping and validation.

get.description: Retrieves the status of merge jobs for finding and tracking record merge operations in Zoho CRM modules.

200.description: Successfully retrieved merge job status information

schema.description: Response containing merge job status information

merge.description: Array of merge job status records

job_id.description: Unique identifier of the merge job

status.description: Current status of the merge job

204.description: No merge jobs found for the specified criteria

400.description: Bad request due to validation errors, invalid data, or business rule violations

oneOf.description: Standard error response for invalid data or record issues

code.description: Error code indicating the type of failure

details.description: Additional error details with context information

resource_path_index.description: Index of the resource path parameter that caused the error

api_name.description: API name of the field or resource that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the field that caused the error

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field

minimum_length.description: Minimum required length for the field

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the issue

oneOf.description: Error response with merge array structure

merge.description: Array of error responses for merge operations

code.description: Error code for the specific merge operation

details.description: Detailed error information for merge operation

api_name.description: API name of the field that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the problematic field

resource_path_index.description: Index of the resource path parameter

limit_due_to.description: Fields that caused the limit to be exceeded

items.description: Field information for limit exceeded error

api_name.description: API name of the dependent field

json_path.description: JSON path to the dependent field

message.description: Error message for the merge operation

post.description: Merges duplicate records in Zoho CRM modules with field mapping and validation. Supports synchronous and asynchronous merge operations.

schema.description: Request body for merging records with field mapping and validation

merge.description: Array of merge operations to be performed

data.description: Array of child records to be merged (minimum 1, maximum 2)

id.description: Unique identifier of the child record to be merged

_fields.description: Array of field configurations for the child record

api_name.description: API name of the field to be configured

id.description: Unique identifier of the file or image

oneOf.description: No file data (will delete all files for this field)

master_record_fields.description: Array of master record field configurations

api_name.description: API name of the master record field

oneOf.description: Array of file/image upload data for master record

items.description: File or image upload information for master record

id.description: Unique identifier of the file or image

oneOf.description: No file data (will delete all files for this field)

code.description: Success code for the merge operation

details.description: Details of the successful merge operation

message.description: Success message for the merge operation

201.description: Merge operation initiated - may be completed synchronously or scheduled asynchronously

oneOf.description: Response when merge operation is completed or scheduled

details.description: Details of the completed merge operation

message.description: Success message for the merge operation

details.description: Details of the scheduled merge operation

job_id.description: Job ID for tracking the scheduled merge

message.description: Message about the scheduled merge operation

merge.description: Array of scheduled merge operation results

details.description: Details of the scheduled merge operation

job_id.description: Job ID for tracking the scheduled merge

message.description: Message about the scheduled merge operation

204.description: No content - merge operation completed without additional data to return

400.description: Bad request due to validation errors, invalid data, or business rule violations

oneOf.description: Standard error response for invalid data or record issues

code.description: Error code indicating the type of failure

details.description: Additional error details with context information

resource_path_index.description: Index of the resource path parameter that caused the error

api_name.description: API name of the field or resource that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the field that caused the error

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field

minimum_length.description: Minimum required length for the field

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the issue

oneOf.description: Error response with merge array structure

merge.description: Array of error responses for merge operations

code.description: Error code for the specific merge operation

details.description: Detailed error information for merge operation

api_name.description: API name of the field that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the problematic field

resource_path_index.description: Index of the resource path parameter

limit_due_to.description: Fields that caused the limit to be exceeded

items.description: Field information for limit exceeded error

api_name.description: API name of the dependent field

json_path.description: JSON path to the dependent field

message.description: Error message for the merge operation

Module.name: module
Module.description: CRM module name for which records should be merged

JobId.name: job_id
JobId.description: Optional job ID to track specific merge operation status

MasterRecordId.name: masterRecordId
MasterRecordId.description: Unique identifier of the master record that will be retained after merge

scopes.ZohoCRM.modules.read: Read access to CRM module records for merge operations
scopes.ZohoCRM.modules.CREATE: Write access to CRM module records for merge operations
scopes.ZohoCRM.modules.all: Full access to CRM modules for merge operations
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.modules.read: Read access to module settings for merge configuration
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.modules.all: Full access to module settings for merge operations
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.all: Full access to all CRM settings
